rationale.root_cause: The response correctly identifies that *(a + 5) on line 13 reads one element past the end of the array a, which is an out-of-bounds stack read.
rationale.local_fix: The response proposes changing *(a + 5) to *(a + 4) or using a[4], which are valid local fixes to prevent the out-of-bounds read.
rationale.global_fix: The response suggests adding bounds checking and using std::array or std::vector, but does not explicitly recommend using .at(5) to throw std::out_of_range.
